input: Request from ai-agents PR #1897 (paraphrased). 'I have a four-PR stack (#1894 reviewer-asymmetry, #1895 build gates, #1896 evidence standards, plus a fourth for guard maturity). They have hard ordering between layers, no Graphite/jujutsu automation, single owner, and single reviewer pool. Per-layer split pays overhead with nothing to show for it. Reviewers grep four diffs to answer where is X; CI runs four times per push. Should I keep the stack split, or consolidate into one PR?'
